div.head: 16. Letter From President Kennedy to Chairman KhrushchevSource: Department of State, Presidential Correspondence: Lot 66 D 204. No classification marking. Another copy of this message is in the Kennedy Library, National Security Files, Countries Series, USSR, Khrushchev Correspondence.
div.p: Dear Mr. Chairman: Many thanks for your kindness in presenting me with a case of beverages during our recent meeting in Vienna.Regarding these meetings June 3-4, see volume V. I would also like to express my appreciation to the Soviet Government for the gold cigar chest, caviar and records. For these courtesies I am very grateful.

closer.note: Printed from a copy that indicates the original was signed by President Kennedy.
